title: Multi-Table SQL
subtitle: Learn joins, relationships, cleaner query writing, and beginner subqueries.
learningGoals: Explain why relational databases split data across tables.
Identify primary keys and foreign keys in beginner schemas.
Write INNER JOIN queries.
Write LEFT JOIN queries.
Interpret unmatched rows and NULLs after LEFT JOIN.
Recognize duplicate rows caused by joins.
Use table aliases to make joins readable.
Format longer SQL across multiple lines.
Use beginner subqueries in WHERE.
Use beginner subqueries in FROM.
Compare join-based and subquery-based solutions.

modules.title: Introduction to Joins
modules.purpose: Show how relational databases connect information stored in different tables.

topics.title: Splitting Data into Tables
topics.summary: Understand splitting data into tables so you can explain the idea in beginner-friendly language.
learningGoals: Describe splitting data into tables in plain language.
Identify a beginner SQL scenario that depends on understanding splitting data into tables.
